Operation 'CleanScanPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. The current description is too minimal and doesn't explain what 'clean' means in this context. Added clarity about resource cleanup, side effects (permanent removal), and expected response to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Cleans up and removes scan resources identified by the provided scanId. This operation terminates the scan process, releases associated resources, and removes scan data from the engine. Returns confirmation of successful cleanup. This operation has permanent side effects and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal and doesn't explain what 'clean' means in this context. Added clarity about resource cleanup, side effects (permanent removal), and expected response to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

message: Operation 'StatusScansPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about what status information is returned and the use case. Enhanced to clarify that it returns multiple scan statuses with relevant details, helping AI agents understand the response structure and when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of all active scans running on the engine. Returns a collection of scan status objects containing scan identifiers, progress information, and current state for each scan. Useful for monitoring multiple concurrent scan operations.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what status information is returned and the use case. Enhanced to clarify that it returns multiple scan statuses with relevant details, helping AI agents understand the response structure and when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'StatusScanPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is too brief and doesn't explain what status information is provided. Added clarity about the response content and use case for monitoring individual scans.

data.current_description: Status of a scan identified by id.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current execution status of a specific scan identified by scanId. Returns a status object containing progress information, current state, and execution details for the requested scan. Use this to monitor individual scan progress.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and doesn't explain what status information is provided. Added clarity about the response content and use case for monitoring individual scans.

message: Operation 'StopScansPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Missing critical information about the side effects (scans cannot be resumed) and what the operation returns. Enhanced to clarify the permanent nature of stopping scans and expected response.

data.description_suggestion: Stops and terminates all currently running scans on the engine. This operation halts all active scan processes immediately. Returns confirmation of scans stopped. Note: Stopped scans cannot be resumed; use this operation with caution.
data.reasoning: Missing critical information about the side effects (scans cannot be resumed) and what the operation returns. Enhanced to clarify the permanent nature of stopping scans and expected response.

message: Operation 'StopScanPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Description lacks detail about what happens when a scan is stopped and what is returned. Added clarity about immediate termination, inability to resume, and expected response for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Stop a scan identified by id.
data.description_suggestion: Stops and terminates a specific scan identified by scanId. Halts the scan process immediately and prevents further execution. Returns confirmation of the scan being stopped. Note: Stopped scans cannot be resumed.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about what happens when a scan is stopped and what is returned. Added clarity about immediate termination, inability to resume, and expected response for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'GetFindingPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are vague about what findings are and when they can be retrieved. Enhanced to clarify that findings are security-related results, explain the response structure (Findings array), and emphasize the requirement that scans must be completed.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve security findings from completed scan
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves security findings and vulnerabilities discovered by a completed scan identified by scanId. Returns a Findings array containing detected issues, their severity levels, and remediation details. This operation only returns results for scans that have finished execution. Findings include security vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and other detected issues.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are vague about what findings are and when they can be retrieved. Enhanced to clarify that findings are security-related results, explain the response structure (Findings array), and emphasize the requirement that scans must be completed.

message: Operation 'StartScanPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is minimal and doesn't explain input requirements or response content. Enhanced to clarify the ScanDefinition input structure, the returned scanId for tracking, asynchronous execution model, and how to monitor the scan afterward.

data.description_suggestion: Initiates a new security scan on the engine using the provided ScanDefinition. Accepts a ScanDefinition object containing scan parameters, target configuration, and scan options. Returns a scan response containing the assigned scanId and initial scan status. The scan executes asynchronously; use the /status/{scanId} endpoint to monitor progress. Side effect: Creates a new scan job on the engine.
data.reasoning: Current description is minimal and doesn't explain input requirements or response content. Enhanced to clarify the ScanDefinition input structure, the returned scanId for tracking, asynchronous execution model, and how to monitor the scan afterward.

message: Operation 'getDefaultPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are too generic and don't clarify the operation's purpose. An AI agent cannot determine if this is a health check, documentation endpoint, or service entry point. data.description_suggestion: Returns the root index page for the Patrowl Engine service. This endpoint serves as the entry point for the API and provides basic service information. Useful for verifying the engine is accessible and operational.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and don't clarify the operation's purpose. An AI agent cannot determine if this is a health check, documentation endpoint, or service entry point. Improved version specifies it's the service index and explains its role in the API.

message: Operation 'getLivenessPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks context about what 'liveness' means in this operational context. AI agents need to understand this is a health check endpoint for monitoring. Improved version clarifies the purpose, use case, and expected response.

data.description_suggestion: Returns the liveness status of the Patrowl Engine service. This endpoint indicates whether the engine process is running and responsive. Used for health monitoring and orchestration systems to determine if the service is alive. Returns a 200 status code if the engine is operational.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about what 'liveness' means in this operational context. AI agents need to understand this is a health check endpoint for monitoring. Improved version clarifies the purpose, use case, and expected response.

message: Operation 'getReadinessPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Description incorrectly states 'liveness page' instead of readiness. Original lacks context distinguishing readiness from liveness. AI agents need to understand when to use this versus liveness endpoint. Improved version clarifies the distinction and operational purpose.

data.description_suggestion: Returns the readiness status of the Patrowl Engine service. This endpoint indicates whether the engine is fully initialized and ready to accept scan requests. Distinct from liveness - readiness checks if the engine has completed startup procedures and loaded configurations. Used for orchestration and load balancing decisions.
data.reasoning: Description incorrectly states 'liveness page' instead of readiness. Original lacks context distinguishing readiness from liveness. AI agents need to understand when to use this versus liveness endpoint. Improved version clarifies the distinction and operational purpose.

message: Operation 'reloadConfigurationPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. data.description_suggestion: Reloads the Patrowl Engine configuration from the configuration file without requiring a service restart. This operation reads the current configuration file and applies any changes to the running engine instance. Side effects: Active scans may be affected if configuration changes impact scan behavior. Returns confirmation of successful reload or error details if reload fails.
data.reasoning: Original summary is awkwardly phrased ('page' terminology is inconsistent with an action endpoint). Description lacks side effect information and doesn't clarify what happens to running operations. message: Operation 'CleanScansPage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks clarity about what 'clean' means and what data is affected. Missing critical side effect information about scan termination and data loss. AI agents need to understand the destructive nature of this operation. Improved version clarifies the action, lists side effects, and includes a warning about irreversibility.

data.summary_suggestion: Clear all active scans and results
data.description_suggestion: Removes all active scans and their associated data from the Patrowl Engine. This operation clears scan results, temporary files, and resets the engine's scan queue. Side effects: All in-progress scans are terminated, scan history is cleared, and any pending scan requests are discarded. Use with caution as this operation cannot be undone. Returns confirmation of cleanup completion.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about what 'clean' means and what data is affected. Missing critical side effect information about scan termination and data loss. AI agents need to understand the destructive nature of this operation. Improved version clarifies the action, lists side effects, and includes a warning about irreversibility.
